headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -111.8)
key_insights: Fears trending up 53% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 129 quotes and a striking 100 at strong intensity, driving the score well above yesterday's already-elevated level.
• At 74.4, frustrations sit in the upper third of their 157-day range, signalling a notably heated day though still well short of the 166.3 peak.
• Optimism slid sharply from -13.5 to -47.2, nearing its all-time low of -58.2, with most quotes at mild or moderate intensity suggesting quiet resignation rather than active despair.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
